name: Appeal to Hope
rules_text: H:2 A:1 HP:7(x4) L:2, M:2 A:1 HP:7(x4) L:2 Cast on friendly, unoccupied town or colony. Creates a neutral, immobile group of 4 Vision swordsmen and 4 Vision archers. (At start of turn, if neutral group occupies structure, group captures structure for the neutral player. Immobile groups cannot be moved.)
